name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-tcbr

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-tcbr
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Tcbr SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Tcbr SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-tcbr
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common tcbr
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.tcbr.v20220217.models.DescribeCloudRunEnvsRequest.__init__
documentation:
> ```
> param _EnvId
>
> 环境ID，如果传了这个参数则只返回该环境的相关信息
>
> type EnvId
>
> str
>
> param _IsVisible
>
> 指定Channels字段为可见渠道列表或不可见渠道列表
> ```

如只想获取渠道A的环境 就填写IsVisible= true,Channels = ["A"], 过滤渠道A拉取其他渠道环境时填写IsVisible= false,Channels = ["A"]
: ```
  type IsVisible

  bool

  param _Channels

  渠道列表，代表可见或不可见渠道由IsVisible参数指定

  type Channels

  list of str
  ```

指定Channels字段为可见渠道列表或不可见渠道列表
如只想获取渠道A的环境 就填写IsVisible= true,Channels = ["A"], 过滤渠道A拉取其他渠道环境时填写IsVisible= false,Channels = ["A"]

  • qcloud ：腾讯云\

  • NORMAL：正常可用\
    • \
  • UNAVAILABLE：服务不可用，可能是尚未初始化或者初始化过程中\
    • > ``` > type Status > > str > > param _IsAutoDegrade > > 是否到期自动降为免费版 > ``` 注意：此字段可能返回 null，表示取不到有效值。 : ``` type IsAutoDegrade bool param _EnvChannel 环境渠道 ``` 注意：此字段可能返回 null，表示取不到有效值。 : ``` type EnvChannel str param _PayMode 支付方式。包含以下取值： ``` \
